docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVICE FEE: $75.00 SERVED NOV-12-2024, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT MARTINEZ, MICHAEL

DECLARATION OF DUE DILIGENCE IN ATTEMPTING SERVICE SERVICE FEE: $50.00 (WAIVED) REMARKS: NOT IN ON THIRD AND FINAL ATTEMPT. THIS SERVICE WAS UNSUCCESSFUL BECAUSE THE RESPONDENT WAS NOT FOUND. ATTEMPTS MADE TO NO AVAIL. NO RESPONSE TO NOTICES LEFT AT THE ADDRESS. FILED BY PLAINTIFF MEERANI, NEERAJ AS TO DEFENDANT MARTINEZ, MICHAEL

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-13-2024 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC-13-2024 BY JUDGE PRO TEM. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PLAINTIFF NEERAJ MEERANI AND DEFENDANT MICHAEL MARTINEZ. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: WILLIAM LYNN. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. (D506)
STIPULATION TO USE JUDGE PRO TEM FILED BY MEERANI, NEERAJ MARTINEZ, MICHAEL

REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF MEERANI, NEERAJ ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-13-2024 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MEERANI, NEERAJ IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT MARTINEZ, MICHAEL PLAINTIFF TAKES NOTHING FROM DEFENDANT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $12,500.00 FILED BY MEERANI, NEERAJ AS TO DEFENDANT MARTINEZ, MICHAEL ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-13-2024 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
